myProjects.title: Scheduling Application with React,node and Socket.IO
myProjects.desc: Built interactive React calendar app with real-time updates and user authentication using FullCalendar, Axios, Socket.IO, and context.

myProjects.title: Interactive Chat with Nuxt.js and Stella
myProjects.desc: This project simplifies building interactive chat applications with Nuxt.js 3 and Stella, a framework for AI-powered chatbots. It utilizes Gsap for captivating animations and Socket.IO for real-time communication, ensuring a seamless and engaging user experience.

myProjects.title: React Portfolio
myProjects.desc: I've built a portfolio website using React and SCSS for design. I created and developed it entirely myself for a friend who is a designer.

myProjects.title: fullstack-app * book
myProjects.desc: I implemented a CRUD system for managing books, along with user registration and login functionalities.

myProjects.title: Three.JS Project
myProjects.desc: Hyper Island Assessment Race is an exciting game where players assist students in driving their car and navigating through a series of assessments without colliding with them. The objective is to reach a 100% score and successfully pass the assessments.

myProjects.title: PERN-TodoList
myProjects.desc: Our group successfully created a full-stack to-do list application. Once a user logs in, user gains the ability to add, update, and remove tasks. Additionally, users can retrieve all tasks for easy reference.

MyInformation.name: Amin Haghi
MyInformation.bio: Combining design and coding to create cool websites and apps is what has piqued my interest in this field
MyInformation.description: I'm a frontend developer who loves working with React and has a good grasp of HTML, CSS, and JavaScript. I enjoy creating apps that are easy to use and look great, and I make sure they work smoothly with APIs and databases.
